prediction.reasoning: Based on historical volatility analysis of LOW (Lowe's), the stock typically exhibits daily volatility around 1.8-2.2%. Over an 18-day period, this translates to approximately 8-9% total volatility. The point estimate assumes slight upward momentum given typical retail seasonal patterns. Confidence intervals are calculated using standard deviation scaling factors (0.67, 1.28, 1.64 for 50%, 80%, 90% respectively) applied to the estimated 18-day volatility of approximately $17-18.
